name: @septopus/game
description: Septopus dev game server — the REAL process behind Pattern-A external games (Game Mode Protocol, game.md §2/§3). Hosts the same self-contained game engines the in-page loopback mocks run (imports client/core games registry), keyed by gameId sessions, speaking exactly the FetchGameApi contract (start → {gameId, state}; * → {state}). Swap the base URL for a production game server and nothing else changes.
